paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Now these are the generations of Esau (the same is Edom).

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Esau took his wives of the daughters of Canaan: Adah the daughter of Elon the Hittite, and Oholibamah the daughter of Anah, the daughter of Zibeon the Hivite,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and Basemath Ishmael`s daughter, sister of Nebaioth.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Adah bare to Esau Eliphaz; and Basemath bare Reuel;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and Oholibamah bare Jeush, and Jalam, and Korah: these are the sons of Esau, that were born unto him in the land of Canaan.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Esau took his wives, and his sons, and his daughters, and all the souls of his house, and his cattle, and all his beasts, and all his possessions, which he had gather in the land of Canaan; and went into a land away from his brother Jacob.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: For their substance was too great for them to dwell together; and the land of their sojournings could not bear them because of their cattle.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Esau dwelt in mount Seir: Esau is Edom.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the generations of Esau the father of the Edomites in mount Seir:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: these are the names of Esau`s sons: Eliphaz the son of Adah the wife of Esau, Reuel the son of Basemath the wife of Esau.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the sons of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zepho, and Gatam, and Kenaz.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Timna was concubine to Eliphaz Esau`s son; and she bare to Eliphaz Amalek: these are the sons of Adah, Esau`s wife.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the sons of Reuel: Nahath, and Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah: these were the sons of Basemath, Esau`s wife.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these were the sons of Oholibamah the daughter of Anah, the daughter of Zibeon, Esau`s wife: and she bare to Esau Jeush, and Jalam, and Korah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These are the chiefs of the sons of Esau: the sons of Eliphaz the first-born of Esau: chief Teman, chief Omar, chief Zepho, chief Kenaz,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: chief Korah, chief Gatam, chief Amalek: these are the chiefs that came of Eliphaz in the land of Edom; these are the sons of Adah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the sons of Reuel, Esau`s son: chief Nahath, chief Zerah, chief Shammah, chief Mizzah: these are the chiefs that came of Reuel in the land of Edom; these are the sons of Basemath, Esau`s wife.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the sons of Oholibamah, Esau`s wife: chief Jeush, chief Jalam, chief Korah: these are the chiefs that came of Oholibamah the daughter of Anah, Esau`s wife.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These are the sons of Esau, and these are their chiefs: the same is Edom.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These are the sons of Seir the Horite, the inhabitants of the land: Lotan and Shobal and Zibeon and Anah,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and Dishon and Ezer and Dishan: these are the chiefs that came of the Horites, the children of Seir in the land of Edom.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the children of Lotan were Hori and Heman. And Lotan`s sister was Timna.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the children of Shobal: Alvan and Manahath and Ebal, Shepho and Onam.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the children of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah; this is Anah who found the hot springs in the wilderness, as he fed the asses of Zibeon his father.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the children of Anah: Dishon and Oholibamah the daughter of Anah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the children of Dishon: Hemdan and Eshban and Ithran and Cheran.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These are the children of Ezer: Bilhan and Zaavan and Akan.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These are the children of Dishan: Uz and Aran.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These are the chiefs that came of the Horites: chief Lotan, chief Shobal, chief Zibeon, chief Anah,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: chief Dishon, chief Ezer, chief Dishan: these are the chiefs that came of the Horites, according to their chiefs in the land of Seir.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned any king over the children of Israel.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Bela the son of Beor reigned in Edom; and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Bela died, and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jobab died, and Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Avith.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Samlah died, and Shaul of Rehoboth by the River reigned in his stead.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Shaul died, and Baal-hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Baal-hanan the son of Achbor died, and Hadar reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pau; and his wife`s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Me-zahab.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And these are the names of the chiefs that came of Esau, according to their families, after their places, by their names: chief Timna, chief Alvah, chief Jetheth,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: chief Oholibamah, chief Elah, chief Pinon,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: chief Kenaz, chief Teman, chief Mibzar,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: chief Magdiel, chief Iram: these are the chiefs of Edom, according to their habitations in the land of their possession. This is Esau, the father of the Edomites.
